title: Income questions 13-24
description: How to complete the income questions 13 to 24 in your paper supplementary tax return.

child_links.title: 13 Partnerships and trusts
child_links.description: Complete question 13 to report income from partnerships and trusts.

child_links.title: 14 Personal services income (PSI)
child_links.description: Complete question 14 to report personal services income (PSI).

child_links.title: 15 Net income or loss from business
child_links.description: Complete question 15 to report income you derive or losses you incur from any business.

child_links.title: 16 Deferred non-commercial business losses
child_links.description: Complete question 16 to report deferred non-commercial business losses.

child_links.title: 17 Net farm management deposits or repayments
child_links.description: Complete question 17 to report net farm management deposits and withdrawals. Primary producers only.

child_links.title: 18 Capital gains
child_links.description: Complete question 18 to report capital gains tax events, capital gains (income) and capital losses.

child_links.title: 19 Foreign entities
child_links.description: Complete question 19 to report your interests in foreign entities.

child_links.title: 20 Foreign source income and foreign assets or property
child_links.description: Complete question 20 to report foreign source income and foreign assets or property.

child_links.title: 21 Rent
child_links.description: Complete question 21 to report rental property income and claim deductions.

child_links.title: 22 Bonuses from life insurance companies and friendly societies
child_links.description: Complete question 22 to report bonuses from life insurance companies and friendly societies.

child_links.title: 23 Forestry managed investment scheme income
child_links.description: Complete question 23 to report income from forestry managed investment schemes.

child_links.title: 24 Other income
child_links.description: Complete question 24 if you have other types of income you need to declare in your supplementary tax return.

child_links.title: Total supplement income or loss 2015
child_links.description: Complete the total supplement income or loss section in your supplementary tax return.
